LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTONIO AMERICO SIPOS, INDIVIDUALLY, AND DBA CUSTOM DOOR COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST EXPLAIN THE INCONSISTENT ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT AND FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: WRITTEN VERSUS ORAL CONTRACT, AND WHY IT NOW BELIEVES SIPOS WAS THE OWNER OF CUSTOM DOOR DURING THE RELEVANT TIME PERIOD. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTONIO AMERICO SIPOS, individually, and dba CUSTOM DOOR COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff must explain the inconsistent allegations of the complaint and first amended complaint: written versus oral contract, and why it now believes Sipos was the owner of Custom Door during the relevant time period. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTONIO AMERICO SIPOS, individually, and dba CUSTOM DOOR COMPANY MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike is Off Calendar, as moot in view of ruling on demurrer. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
